prestazioni: Engine: EB2DTS (1.6L PureTech turbocharged inline-4) – Full forged internals upgrade with Manley 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings to handle 300+ HP reliably. Stock turbo replaced with Garrett GT2260SZ (ball-bearing, 0.63 A/R turbine housing) for optimized spool and 280-300whp potential with supporting mods.

Fuel System: Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors paired with a Syvecs S6Plus standalone ECU (OEM ECU bypass) for full flex-fuel (E85) compatibility. Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump with a Radium Engineering surge tank to prevent fuel starvation under lateral G-forces. Custom 3D-printed intake manifold with velocity stacks for optimized airflow.

Suspension & Handling: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (DS-specific valving) with 20mm front and 15mm rear adjustable camber plates. Eibach Pro-Spacer 15mm wheel spacers (hub-centric, 5x108 bolt pattern) to eliminate wheel gap. Brembo GT 340mm 2-piece front rotors with 4-piston calipers (direct bolt-on, no modifications) and Ferodo DS2500 brake pads for aggressive street/track use.
estetica: Aero: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit (DS 3 Crossback-specific, bolt-on fenders with 30mm extended arches) paired with a custom carbon fiber front splitter (3D-scanned for OEM fitment) and a Maxton Design GT-style rear diffuser. Side skirts replaced with custom 3M 2080 Series vinyl wrap in Satin Stealth Black for a stealth OEM+ look.

Wheels: WORK Emotion CR Kiwami 2 (18x9.5 +25 ET, 5x108 PCD) in Gloss Gunmetal with custom center caps featuring the DS Automobiles logo. Tires: Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R (245/40/18 front, 255/35/18 rear) for maximum grip. Wheel hardware upgraded to BONOSS forged titanium lug bolts (M12x1.5, 25mm length).

Interior: Full Alcantara retrim with DS Performance Line stitching (Steel Grey with Red contrast) on dashboard, door cards, and Recaro Sportster CS seats (DS-specific mounting brackets). Custom roll cage (T45 steel, bolt-in design) with integrated harness bar for 4-point Schroth Profi II EVO belts. OMP steering wheel (330mm, suede) with quick-release hub and DS logo embroidery.
